title: Better Cauldrons
body:
**Better Cauldrons**

Make cauldrons have more useful uses, like:

- Cooking meat and potatoes!![cooking foods!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45546e72d292bcd56a6b5aba9bc733646aaf8e8a.png)

- Washing Wool & Concrete!![washing stuff!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/008569e4f9ac407a035f711eeab70e7a93f7fd15.png)
